tasks.subject: Plan Task 1: Lockdown test scaffold + prompt_node_ids type regression (RED)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land four lockdown tests + one type-regression test as RED. They go GREEN at end of Plan Task 4 when real graph + YAML edits land. Fully offline.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 4 tests exist with the exact names listed in plan §Task 1
- pixi run pytest reports 4 FAILED
- pre-commit clean

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py -v` → 4 failed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 tests exist", "4 FAIL against placeholder graph", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 2: Capture /object_info from warm pod (LIVE — user gate)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Boot warm RunPod pod via existing live smoke, capture ComfyUI /object_info response, commit as test fixture. Keep pod warm — Tasks 3/4/5 reuse it.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Sub-spec §8.3 checkpoint #1 (before pod boot). Spends real money. Confirm creds + budget first.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/object_info_wan21.json`
- Modify: `.pre-commit-config.yaml` (large-files exclude)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Pod boots, ComfyUI :8188 reachable via proxy
- Fixture exists, parses, ≥ 100 KB
- Contains WanVideoSampler / WanVideoModelLoader / LoadImage etc.
- Pod STAYS RUNNING (no destroy) for downstream tasks

**Verify:** `test -f ... && jq -e 'has("WanVideoSampler")' ...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/object_info_wan21.json", ".pre-commit-config.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "test -f tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/object_info_wan21.json && jq -e 'has(\"WanVideoSampler\")' tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/object_info_wan21.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pod up", "fixture committed", "WanVideoSampler entry present", "fixture ≥ 100 KB", "pod stays running", "pre-commit large-files exclude added"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "step-1"}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 3: Hand-author API-format graph + parse-validate (LIVE — user gate)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Translate kijai desktop workflow into ComfyUI API format using captured /object_info schema. POST /prompt until 200. Commit final passing graph only.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Sub-spec §8.3 checkpoint #2 (after first /prompt 200). Pause after Step 5 + confirm parse-clean.

**Files:**
- Create: `examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.graph.json` (replaces 166-byte placeholder)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- JSON dict, exactly 26 entries
- Semantic string IDs per locked mapping (sub-spec §7.4)
- Every entry has class_type + inputs
- Every class_type in /object_info fixture
- POST /prompt → 200 with non-empty prompt_id
- Queue cancelled, no render performed

**Verify:** `jq -e 'length == 26 ...'` + recorded /prompt 200 response.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.graph.json"], "verifyCommand": "jq -e 'length == 26 and ([.[] | has(\"class_type\") and has(\"inputs\")] | all)' examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.graph.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["26 entries", "semantic string IDs", "class_type + inputs on every entry", "every class_type in /object_info fixture", "POST /prompt → 200", "queue cancelled, no render"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "step-5"}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 4: YAML wiring → real node IDs + Layer J dict type
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update example YAML so asset_node_ids.init_image: load_image, prompt_node_ids.positive: text_encode_pos (dict, not list). Task 1 lockdown tests transition RED → GREEN.

**Files:**
- Modify: `examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- asset_node_ids.init_image = load_image
- prompt_node_ids is dict with positive: text_encode_pos
- node_overrides is {}
- Task 1 lockdown tests RED → GREEN (4 pass)
- Full offline suite stays green

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py -v` → 4 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["asset_node_ids.init_image=load_image", "prompt_node_ids is dict with positive key", "node_overrides empty dict", "Task 1 lockdown tests RED → GREEN", "full offline suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 5: Live full execution → green MP4 + bug-catch commits (LIVE — user gate)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run kinoforge generate against warm pod with new graph + YAML. Drive ComfyUI through full Wan 2.1 i2v render. Capture non-empty MP4 with valid ftyp magic. Capture HTTP fixtures. Patch any production bugs (each = own commit + offline regression test).

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Sub-spec §8.3 checkpoint #3 (after green MP4). Bug-catch budget: 5 distinct classes. Abort sub-plan if exceeded.

**Files (may modify, zero or more):**
- src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py, nodes.py
- src/kinoforge/core/provision_state.py
- src/kinoforge/sources/huggingface/__init__.py or TARGET_TO_SUBDIR
- tests/engines/test_comfyui.py + fixtures/comfyui/*

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Non-empty MP4 produced
- First 12 bytes contain ftypisom/iso5/iso6/mp42
- MP4 ≥ 100 KB
- Every code patch has offline regression test (Layer N pattern)
- Bug-catch budget ≤ 5 distinct classes
- Pod destroyed at end
- Total cost burn (Tasks 2–5) ≤ $1.50

**Verify:** Sub-spec AC5+AC6 from §10. MP4 magic-byte check + cost-burn read.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/nodes.py", "src/kinoforge/core/provision_state.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui.py", "tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py -v -s", "acceptanceCriteria": ["non-empty MP4", "ftyp magic valid", "MP4 ≥ 100 KB", "every code patch has regression test", "bug-catch budget ≤5 not exceeded", "pod destroyed", "total cost ≤ $1.50"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "step-4", "requireEvidenceTokens": [["smoke-fail", "before-patch", "node_errors"], ["smoke-green", "after-patch", "ftypisom", "ftypiso5", "ftypiso6", "ftypmp42"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 6: /object_info fixture lockdown test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add one offline test that loads /object_info fixture + asserts every class_type in committed graph also exists in fixture. Locks fixture as schema-reference-of-record.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/engines/test_comfyui.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- New test test_object_info_fixture_covers_graph_class_types
- Test passes
- Full offline suite grows by 1 vs end-of-Task-4 baseline

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py::test_object_info_fixture_covers_graph_class_types -v` → 1 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/test_comfyui.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py::test_object_info_fixture_covers_graph_class_types -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test exists", "test passes", "no regressions in full offline suite"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 7: PROGRESS.md closure row
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add item #3 closure block to PROGRESS.md (mirror item #1/#2 shape); mark item #3 + item #4 CLOSED in Pending Task 7 work list; update Branch state SHA table, test counts, cost burn.

**Files:**
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Closure block added with sub-spec/sub-plan paths, atomic commits, MP4 evidence, cost burn, bug-catch list, test count delta, key design decisions
- item #3 + item #4 marked CLOSED in Pending list
- Branch state SHA table updated
- Test counts + cost burn lines updated

**Verify:** `rg -n 'item #3.*CLOSED' PROGRESS.md` → at least 2 hits.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "rg -n 'item #3.*CLOSED' PROGRESS.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["closure block added", "item #3 + item #4 marked CLOSED in Pending list", "Branch state SHA table updated", "test counts line updated", "cost burn updated"]}
```
